app.name: RepoStore
app.one_liner: A GitHub-powered Android app store that discovers repositories shipping real installable APKs and lets you install, track, and update them from one place.

screens.name: App Detail Screen
screens.purpose: Show comprehensive information about a GitHub repository’s app, including release notes, stats, developer info, README, and installation status.

screens.name: Home Screen
screens.purpose: Display curated lists of GitHub repositories that ship installable APKs, organized into sections such as Trending, Recently Updated, and Featured.

screens.name: Settings Screen
screens.purpose: Allow users to customize app behavior including theme (dark/light/system), download preferences, and proxy settings.

rust_commands.name: detect_installed_apps
rust_commands.purpose: Map installed Android packages to known GitHub repositories using a local database for accurate update and uninstall tracking.

rust_commands.name: fetch_github_releases_with_apks
rust_commands.purpose: Discover and validate GitHub repositories that publish real installable APK assets in their releases.

rust_commands.name: select_architecture_appropriate_apk
rust_commands.purpose: Choose the correct APK variant (arm64, x86_64, etc.) based on device architecture during installation.

rust_commands.name: uninstall_app
rust_commands.purpose: Remove an installed application directly from the app detail screen using Android's package manager.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build home screen with trending/recently updated sections
week 1: Create basic app detail view showing README and release info
week 1: Implement core GitHub API integration to fetch repos with APK assets
week 2: Add architecture-aware APK selection logic
week 2: Implement local database for installed app tracking
week 2: Integrate uninstall functionality from detail screen
week 3: Add reproducible build support and unit tests
week 3: Develop settings screen with theme and proxy options
week 3: Refine UI with Material 3 and system color adaptation
acceptance_tests: Installed apps are correctly detected and mapped to their source repository.
Releases without valid APKs are excluded from all listings.
Settings screen allows toggling between dark/light/system themes without crashing.
The app selects the correct APK architecture variant during installation.
User can browse and install an APK from a GitHub repository that provides valid assets.
User can uninstall an app directly from the detail screen.
